LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewer.label: gastric acid spewer
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewer.description: A digestive organ that spreads gastric acid nearby, damaging creatures and objects while converting corpses and food into hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewerEmbryo.label: gastric acid spewer embryo
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewerEmbryo.description: An immature digestive organ that will grow into a gastric acid spewer.
